attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT NSLPATV.SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY, 
NSLPATV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
NSLPATV.DSCNT_APPLD_AUTOMATICALLY_FLG, 
NSLPATV.PRICE_ADJ_CHANGE_REASON_CD, 
NSLPATV.BK_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD, 
NSLPATV.PRICE_ADJ_OPERAND_AMT, 
NSLPATV.PRICE_ADJ_APPLICATION_MTHD_CD, 
NSLPATV.PRICE_ADJ_APPLIED_FLG, 
NSLPATV.SK_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT, 
NSLPATV.SS_CD, NSLPATV.DISCOUNT_ROLE, 
NSLPATV.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
NSLPATV.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
NSLPATV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
NSLPATV.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
NSLPATV.RU_BK_DISCOUNT_REQUEST_ID_INT, 
NSLPATV.RU_BK_DISCOUNT_REQ_VER_NUM_INT, 
NSLPATV.RU_BK_DISCOUNT_ID_INT, 
NSLPATV.RU_DSCNT_APLD_POST_TRM_PRD_FLG, 
NSLPATV.ADJSTD_PER_QTY_DSCNT_USD_AMT, 
NSLPATV.ADJSTD_USD_AMT, 
NSLPATV.LIST_LINE_TYPE_CD, 
NSLPATV.DSCNT_APPLD_LVL_CD, 
NSLPATV.DSCNT_VAL_PER_QTY_AMT, 
NSLPATV.DSCNT_PCT, 
NSLPATV.DSCNT_MODIFIER_KEY, 
NSLPATV.PROMOTION_CD, 
NSLPATV.PROMOTION_TYPE_CD, 
NSLPATV.CONTEXT_CD, 
NSLPATV.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG, 
NSLPATV.SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_DESCR, 
NSLPATV.SK_LIST_HEADER_ID_INT, 
NSLPATV.SK_LIST_LINE_ID_INT, 
NSLPATV.TIME_BOUND_CRDT_TRM_MTHS_CNT, 
NSLPATV.IS_TIME_BOUND_CRDT_APPLD_FLG, 
NSLPATV.CREDIT_TYPE_NAME, 
NSLPATV.APPLICABLE_AT_RENEWAL_FLG, 
NSLPATV.PRICE_ADJ_GROUP_TYPE_NAME, 
NSLPATV.MNTLY_SUBSCR_PR_ADJ_CR_USD_AMT, 
NSLPATV.PRICE_ADJ_RECURRENCE_TYPE_CD, 
NSLPATV.CREDIT_CATEGORY_CD, 
NSLPATV.CREDIT_CATEGORY_APPLICABLE_START_DTM, 
NSLPATV.DV_CREDIT_CATEGORY_APPLICABLE_START_DT, 
NSLPATV.CREDIT_CATEGORY_APPLICABLE_END_DTM, 
NSLPATV.DV_CREDIT_CATEGORY_APPLICABLE_END_DT, 
NSLPATV.CREDIT_CD,
NSLPATV.CHARGE_TYPE_CD,
NSLPATV.MNTLY_SUBSCR_CHRG_UPLIFT_LCL_AMT 
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SO_LINE_PRICE_ADJUSTMENT_TV NSLPATV
WHERE NSLPATV.SS_CD = 'OPL' AND
NSLPATV.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
